title: Judge postpones Hunter Biden trial on tax charges to Sept. 5
shortDescription: A federal judge postponed Hunter Biden's trial on tax charges to give his lawyers more time to prepare after his first trial on gun charges.

title: Progressive Congressional Dems known as 'The Squad'
shortDescription: The progressive Democratic bloc has grown from four to nine members since 2018.

title: Hawaii will include two constitutional amendments in November election
shortDescription: Hawaii voters will decide on same-sex marriage rights and judicial appointment reforms, marking the first constitutional amendments since 2018.

title: Why Kari Lake's campaign says Senate victory in Arizona is within reach
shortDescription: After months of lagging in fundraising and public polling, Kari Lake's campaign sought to reset the U.S. Senate race expectations in Arizona.

title: Trump had classified records at Mar-a-Lago 4 months after FBI search
shortDescription: Recently unsealed records in Donald Trump's classified records case revealed he still had records at Mar-a-Lago months after the FBI search.

title: Trump claims he 'nearly escaped death' in Mar-a-Lago raid; FBI responds
shortDescription: The FBI has responded after former president Donald Trump claimed that Joe Biden's FBI was "locked & loaded ready" to take him out during 2022 raid.

title: British PM Rishi Sunak calls surprise July election, loss expected
shortDescription: British Prime Minister Rishi Sunak announced a July election, as his ruling Conservative Party seeks to beat out Labour Party.

title: California Senate race 2024: Context and what's at stake
shortDescription: California's Senate primary set up a likely win for Democrat Adam Schiff but what does the race explain about representation in the state?

title: Capitol Police investigating vials of blood sent to RNC headquarters in DC
shortDescription: The Republican National Committee building was evacuated on Wednesday morning due to a suspicious package.

title: Hush money trial: Trump doesn't testify; defense rests | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: An activist group with ties to old groups that funded Hamas. | A key pro-Israel group is spending big this year to elect people to Congress.

title: Hunter Biden’s criminal trials near as president preps for a busy June
shortDescription: The president will be prepping to debate Trump while his son goes on federal trial twice in a matter of weeks.

title: Pro-Israel groups are pouring money into Democratic and GOP primaries
shortDescription: AIPAC, pro-Israel groups winning pmore elections amid fundraising boost.primaries

title: Voters weigh women celebs' shot at the polls
shortDescription: Although some high-profile men have made the transition from stardom to politician, no woman has yet. We polled voters to ask who they might support.

title: Key Trump trial players win Georgia primaries
shortDescription: Fulton Co. District Attorney Fani Willis and Fulton Co. Judge Scott McAfee both won their Georgia primary races.

title: All South Dakota tribes vote to banish Gov. Kristi Noem from reservation
shortDescription: Flandreau Santee Sioux Tribe voted to formally banish South Dakota Gov. Kristi Noem from their lands because of disparaging remarks.

title: False claim Biden canceled debates with Trump in May 2024 | Fact check
shortDescription: President Joe Biden and former President Donald Trump are scheduled for two debates this year. Biden did not pull out of the debates.

title: Giuliani pleads not guilty in AZ election case
shortDescription: Former Donald Trump campaign lawyer Rudy Giuliani appeared remotely in Arizona court to plead not guilty in the 2020 election case.

title: OnPolitics: Trump and Biden's debate is in Georgia. What to know
shortDescription: The first presidential debate will take place in Atlanta, Georgia. Its location has a history for Trump.

title: Doctored image of Trump crowd didn't come from Trump | Fact check
shortDescription: The altered image was first shared as satire by an account with no affiliation to Trump. There is no record of the former president sharing it.
